ABOUT.SUBTITLE: A love story in the making
ABOUT.INTRO: Two people, one journey. Here's a little glimpse into who we are and how we got here — the moments, the memories, and everything in between.
ABOUT.BRIDE_TAGLINE: Free spirit, adventure lover, coffee addict
ABOUT.BRIDE_BIO: Grew up with a love for travel and creativity. She brings warmth, laughter, and a touch of magic to every room she enters.
ABOUT.BRIDE_QUOTE: "Life is short — eat the cake, take the trip, say yes."
ABOUT.GROOM_TAGLINE: Tech enthusiast, mountain hiker, amateur chef
ABOUT.GROOM_BIO: Equal parts analytical and warm-hearted, he balances big ideas with an even bigger laugh. He knew she was the one the moment she beat him at chess.
ABOUT.GROOM_FACT_2: Builds things just to take them apart
ABOUT.GROOM_FACT_3: Makes better risotto than most restaurants
ABOUT.GROOM_QUOTE: "The best view comes after the hardest climb."
ABOUT.COMING_SUB: We're still preparing some surprises for you — stay tuned!
ABOUT.COMING_SNACK: "{{feature}}" is coming soon — check back later! 🚀
ABOUT.CS_GUESTBOOK_DESC: Leave us a message or a heartfelt wish
ABOUT.CS_MUSIC_DESC: Suggest a song for the dance floor
ABOUT.CS_STREAM_DESC: Watch the ceremony online from anywhere
ABOUT.CS_PHOTOBOOTH_DESC: Access photos taken at the photo booth
ABOUT.CS_NEWSLETTER_DESC: Get photos & videos after the wedding
ABOUT.GALLERY_SUBTITLE: A few of our favourite moments together
ABOUT.TL_1_TEXT: A mutual friend brought two strangers together at a dinner party. Little did we know that evening would change everything.
ABOUT.TL_2_TEXT: We packed our bags and explored new horizons side by side. That trip confirmed we were meant to travel through life together.
ABOUT.TL_3_TEXT: We found our little nest — a cosy home full of laughter. Sunday mornings and quiet evenings became our favourite routines.
ABOUT.TL_4_TEXT: Under a sky full of stars, on our favourite trail, the question was asked — and the answer was an instant, tearful yes.
ABOUT.TL_5_TEXT: And so the next chapter begins. Surrounded by the people we love most, we say 'I do' and start our greatest adventure yet.
